title: C. difficile Infection
subtitle: Understanding and recovering from Clostridioides difficile infection
description: Clear, evidence-based information about C. difficile infection — causes, symptoms, treatment options including fecal transplant, and how to prevent recurrence. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.
